name: gamestore-xbox
description: Provides discovery and launch support for Microsoft Store (XBox pass) games

scripts._build: pnpm run pack && extractInfo && copyfiles -u 1 dist/**/* ../../src/main/out/bundledPlugins/gamestore-xbox
scripts._dist: pnpm run pack && extractInfo && copyfiles -u 1 dist/**/* ../../src/main/dist/bundledPlugins/gamestore-xbox

author: Black Tree Gaming Ltd.
